X/Yamakavagga/X/1.text: Alaṅkaritvā puttaṁ vā dhītaraṁ vā labhitvā (Sī, Syā)

variants.reading: Alaṅkaritvā puttaṁ vā dhītaraṁ vā labhitvā

X/Yamakavagga/X/1.text: Tumhe pana sāmīti (Syā), tumhe pana kiṁ sāmīti (Sī)
Taṁ pavattiṁ ārocesuṁ. Te taṁ sutvā (Ka)

variants.reading: Taṁ pavattiṁ ārocesuṁ. Te taṁ sutvā

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Yamakavagga/X/4.text: Kuhiṁ tvaṁ na passissasi (Sī), kuhiṁ pana tvaṁ passasi (Ka)

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Yamakavagga/X/5.text: Bālakaloṇakārāmaṁ (Sī, Syā), Pālileyyakagāmaṁ (Ka) Vi 3. 497 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Yamakavagga/X/6.text: Dī 2. 129, 161; Saṁ 1. 160, 398; Khu 5. 22 piṭṭhesu. 7. Aparicitaṭṭhāne (Sī, Syā)

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Yamakavagga/X/10.text: Na vimuccatīti (Sī, Ka) Ma 1. 281 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.
Mokkhadhammaṁ pana gavesituṁ vaṭṭati, gavedantehi nāma ekaṁ pabbajjaṁ laddhuṁ vaṭṭati (Syā)

variants.reading: gavedantehi nāma ekaṁ pabbajjaṁ laddhuṁ vaṭṭati

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Yamakavagga/X/10.text: Uyyojetvā pañcahi māṇavakasatehi saddhiṁ Sañcayassa (Sī, Syā)
Khaḷaggaṁ maddanaggaṁ minaggaṁ (Ka) Aṁ-Ṭṭha 1. 111 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Yamakavagga/X/14.text: Tuyhaṁ pana attadutiyassa (Sī), tuyhaṁ attano dutiyassa (Syā)

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Yamakavagga/X/16.text: Pabbajissasi (Sī, Ka) Vi 4. 336 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.
Khu 3. 51; Khu 11. 396 piṭṭhesu. 4-4. Bhikkhū kira ... na labhanti (Sī, Syā)
Āyatibhavassa ca paccayaṁ (Sī), āyatiṁ bhavassa paccayaṁ (Syā)

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Appamādavagga/X/24.text: Na gacchāma (Sī, Syā) 4-4. Me pabbajjā avāritā, tasmā tava pabbajjā bhaddakā (Ka)

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Appamādavagga/X/29.text: Vaṭṭapadaṁ jahitvā (Sī), vaṭṭe pana naṁ mandapaññaṁ hitvā (Syā)
Pure pure (Sī) Saṁ 1. 230 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.
Aho ayyāya rūpaṁ, aho attabhāvamaṇḍanassa phalaṁ (Syā, Ka)

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Pupphavagga/X/46.text: Mahānāmasakkassa jātāti (Sī, Syā), Mahānāmasakkassa paṭicca jātāti (Ka)

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Pupphavagga/X/47.text: Amhākaṁ pana vassasataṁ (Sī, Syā), amhākaṁ pana manussānaṁ vassasataṁ (Ka)

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Pupphavagga/X/48.text: Amhākaṁ pana vassasataṁ (Sī, Syā), amhākaṁ pana manussānaṁ vassasataṁ (Ka)

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Pupphavagga/X/57.text: Sveva daṇḍo dāpito (Sī), tasseva daṇḍaṁ pāpito (Ka)

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Bālavagga/X/60.text: Rukkhamūlampi (Syā, Ka) 3-3. Tehi kathitakāle “uppannaṁ bhayaṁ na mayaṁ sakkhissāmā”ti vutte sakkaṁ upasaṅkamitvā(Ka)

variants.reading: 3-3. Tehi kathitakāle “uppannaṁ bhayaṁ na mayaṁ sakkhissāmā”ti vutte sakkaṁ upasaṅkamitvā

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Paṇḍitavagga/X/78.text: Tassā ovāde ṭhatvā (Sī), tassā vacane ṭhatvā (Syā)
Yesaṁ pana tathārūpānaṁ natthi, te yattha katthaci (Ka)
Aggaggāneva (Sī) Aṁ-Ṭṭha 1. 248; Saṁ-Ṭṭha 2. 225 piṭṭhesu pana passitabbaṁ.

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Paṇḍitavagga/X/79.text: Aho suhito bhikkhu yo tava paṇṇaṁ khādissatīti (Syā)

variants.reading: Aho suhito bhikkhu yo tava paṇṇaṁ khādissatīti

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Paṇḍitavagga/X/79.text: Arahatte pana patte (Syā), arahattaṁ pana patte (Sī), arahattaṁ pana pattena (Ka) Kāṇamātuvatthumhi 375 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Paṇḍitavagga/X/80.text: Arahatte pana patte (Syā), arahattaṁ pana patte (Sī), arahattaṁ pana pattena (Ka) Kāṇamātuvatthumhi 375 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Arahantavagga/X/97.text: Kuto tassa taṁ ramaṇīyaṁ, tāva suddhakaṁ kaṇṭakakhadirarukkhagahanaṁ (Ka)

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Sahassavagga/X/101.text: Ime suvaṇṇakeyūrā, sabbe veḷuriyāmayā. Sabbañca gaṇhā bhaddante, mamaṁ dāsiñca sāvayāti. (Sī, Syā, Ka) Khu 4. 242 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Sahassavagga/X/109.text: Tāso te natthi na bhayaṁ (Sī, Syā)

Natthi cetasikaṁ dukkhaṁ, anapekkhassa Gāmaṇi. Atikkanto bhayaṁ sabbaṁ, khīṇasaṁyojano isī. Khīṇā cassa bhavanetti, diṭṭhā dhammā yathā tathā. Nibbhayaṁ maraṇaṁ hoti, bhāravoropanaṁ yathāti (Sī, Syā) Khu 2. 320 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Sahassavagga/X/112.text: Amma ācikkhituṁ na yuttanti. Vadehi me tātāti (Syā)

variants.reading: Amma ācikkhituṁ na yuttanti. Vadehi me tātāti

Dhammapadaṭṭhakathā/Sahassavagga/X/114.text: Katipāhaccayena jeṭṭhaputtassa gehaṁ agamāsi, jeṭṭhaputtassa (Sī, Ka)
